text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《轻松学英语》播客，在这里我们用简单的英语进行真实的对话，帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Georgie. And I'm Neil. To watch a video version of this podcast and download a free worksheet,
zh: 我是乔姬。我是尼尔。想观看本播客的视频版并下载免费练习表，

text: go to our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 请访问我们的网站 bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Neil, how are you? Are you happy to be at work today? Of course, I'm always happy to be at work.
zh: 嗨，尼尔，你好吗？今天上班开心吗？当然，我一直都很喜欢上班。

text: Great. Well, today we are talking about dream jobs.
zh: 太好了。今天我们要聊聊梦想中的工作。

text: Obviously, this job is amazing, but we're going to talk about some different jobs we'd like to do.
zh: 当然，我们现在的工作已经很棒了，不过我们要聊聊其他想做的工作。

text: Sounds good. Shall we start? Yes. So, Georgie,
zh: 听起来不错，那我们开始吧？好。乔姬，

text: when you were a child, what did you want to do when you grew up? What was your dream job?
zh: 你小时候长大后想做什么？你的梦想工作是什么？

text: Well, when I was really little, about five or six, I remember telling people that I wanted to be a princess
zh: 我记得五六岁的时候，我跟别人说我想当公主，

text: when I realized that wasn't going to be possible for me my next dream was to be a pop star because
zh: 后来我意识到那不可能实现，于是我的下一个梦想是当流行歌星，因为

text: my friends and I used to write songs and perform in front of our parents and I thought that would be really fun
zh: 我和朋友们经常写歌，然后在父母面前表演，我觉得那样很有趣。

text: yeah what about you well kind of similar I think actually when I was
zh: 是啊，那你呢？其实跟你差不多，我小时候

text: when I was a child i thought that being a professional sportsman would be fantastic
zh: 我小时候觉得当职业运动员会很棒，

text: either a footballer or a cricketer what went wrong i'm not good enough
zh: 要么当足球运动员，要么当板球运动员。后来怎么没做成？因为我不够厉害。

text: i learned that lesson um but also i wanted
zh: 我明白了这一点，不过我还想，

text: when i got a little bit older sort of teenage and started playing guitar i thought yeah maybe Maybe a rock star would be the thing for me.
zh: 再大一点，十几岁开始弹吉他的时候，我觉得也许当摇滚明星会适合我。

text: So Neil, obviously you are not a rock star, but how or when did you decide to become an English teacher
zh: 尼尔，你现在显然不是摇滚明星，那你是怎么或者什么时候决定要当英语老师的呢？

text: instead? Well, when I finished university, I wanted to travel more than anything else.
zh: 嗯，大学毕业后，我最想做的事就是去旅行。

text: And I wanted to live in foreign countries, not just go on holiday.
zh: 而且我想在国外生活，而不只是去度假。

text: And I thought a good way to do that would be to become an English teacher.
zh: 我觉得当英语老师是实现这个愿望的好办法。

text: Yeah, I have a similar story. It was the same thing for me. I just wanted to live abroad.
zh: 是啊，我也有类似的经历。我当时也是一样，就是想去国外生活。

text: Georgie, what is important to you about your job now?
zh: 乔姬，你现在的工作中什么对你来说最重要？

text: Well, many of us spend a lot of our lives working.
zh: 嗯，我们很多人一生中大部分时间都在工作。

text: So for me, it's really important to enjoy the day.
zh: 所以对我来说，享受每一天真的很重要。

text: We work nine to five. It's a lot of hours in the day.
zh: 我们朝九晚五地工作，一天里工作时间很长。

text: It's really important to me to have a nice team that you can have fun with.
zh: 能有一个相处愉快的团队，对我来说非常重要。

text: um it's also really important for me to um
zh: 嗯，另外对我来说也很重要的是，

text: feel like I'm giving something good or doing a good job
zh: 感觉自己在贡献一些有意义的东西，或者把工作做好。

text: what about you yeah I think it's important to feel that you're doing something useful
zh: 你呢？我觉得重要的是感觉自己在做有用的事情，

text: so hopefully our conversations like this are useful for people
zh: 所以希望我们这样的对话对大家有用，

text: because they can learn something and And I like that. Yeah, me too.
zh: 因为这样他们就能学到东西。我也很喜欢这一点。是啊，我也是。

text: So, Neil, if you didn't have to worry about money or anything else,
zh: 那尼尔，如果你不用担心钱或者其他任何事情，

text: what would your dream job be? I think I know the answer already.
zh: 你的梦想工作会是什么？我想我已经知道答案了。

text: Yeah, well, you said earlier that I didn't become a rock star, but there is still a future.
zh: 是啊，你之前说我没能成为摇滚明星，不过未来还是有可能的。

text: And, you know, if I didn't have to work, I could just follow my dream.
zh: 如果我不用工作，我就能去追求我的梦想。

text: How about you? I think if I didn't do this job,
zh: 你呢？我想如果我不做现在这份工作，

text: I would like to be a travel photographer or someone that makes documentaries.
zh: 我会想当旅行摄影师，或者做纪录片的人。

text: I really love those nature documentaries and it would be very
zh: 我真的很喜欢那些自然纪录片，能参与其中会很有意思。

text: fun to be involved in those. Yes, that sounds like it would be amazing.
zh: 是啊，那听起来一定很棒。

text: OK, let's recap the language we heard during the conversation.
zh: 好了，我们来回顾一下这次对话中学到的表达。

text: We can describe something, like a job, as important to us.
zh: 我们可以用“对我们来说很重要”来描述某样事物，比如一份工作。

text: For example, I said that a nice team at work is important to me.
zh: 比如，我说过在工作中有一个不错的团队对我来说很重要。

text: We talked about our dream jobs when we were children, using the structure, when I was younger, I wanted to be.
zh: 我们用“当我小的时候，我想成为……”这个句型来谈小时候的梦想工作。

text: So, for example, when I was younger, I wanted to be a footballer.
zh: 比如，当我小的时候，我想成为一名足球运动员。

text: And we talked about our dream jobs now using conditionals.
zh: 我们还用条件句来谈现在的梦想工作。

text: So, for example, if I could do any job, I would be a travel photographer.
zh: 比如，如果我可以做任何工作，我会成为一名旅行摄影师。

text: And when we're talking about jobs, we can do them or we can be them.
zh: 当我们谈论职业时，可以用动词形式，也可以用“是……”的形式。

text: For example, I teach English or I am an English teacher.
zh: 比如，我教英语，或者我是一名英语老师。

text: And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期《轻松学英语》的全部内容。

text: If you like our programmes, why not sign up to our email newsletter?
zh: 如果你喜欢我们的节目，不妨订阅我们的邮件通讯，

text: You can get suggestions for other English lessons you might enjoy.
zh: 你可以获得其他你可能感兴趣的英语课程推荐。

text: There's a link in the notes for this programme. Join us again. Bye!
zh: 节目说明里有链接。我们下次再见，拜拜！
